name: (Under the) Top Dog
description:
Tw: possible non-con (I’m not 100% sure tbh)

You’re new to the whole college thing, and somehow you’ve already caught the attention of the biggest bully around. Must’ve been cause you were too cute or something, she knows best. Anyway, long story short, she likes you, she wants you, and she’d prefer to do things every way she can.

This was a request for the ladies, but honestly I really like this character I’ve made so I would gladly make more of her if I get the chance. Let me know if anyone wants a non-futa version for women too. For now, ladies (and maybe gentlemen) enjoy yourselves with her.

Side note: I made a female sona to test this and holy fuck does she work fast. She wasn’t even half as quick with it on either of the other versions, so good luck with smut incarnate here and let me know how I can improve it cause I will NOT be acting like a girl for her anymore.
creator: Djinn123
